title: Skilled residence pathways in New Zealand :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Skilled residence pathways in New Zealand
Find out how to get a resident visa for New Zealand based on your skills.
- Getting New Zealand residence based on your skills You can work towards getting a resident visa to live in New Zealand, depending on your job and skills. When you meet the requirements, you can apply for residence.

## Getting New Zealand residence based on your skills
You can work towards getting a resident visa to live in New Zealand, depending on your job and skills. When you meet the requirements, you can apply for residence.
- Skilled migrant category pathway to residence This pathway to New Zealand residence is for people with a skilled job who have occupational registration, a bachelor's qualification or higher, or earn 1.5 times the median wage.

## Skilled migrant category pathway to residence
This pathway to New Zealand residence is for people with a skilled job who have occupational registration, a bachelor's qualification or higher, or earn 1.5 times the median wage.
- Green List pathway to residence This pathway to New Zealand residence is for people who have a Tier 1 or Tier 2 job on the Green List of in-demand jobs.

## Green List pathway to residence
This pathway to New Zealand residence is for people who have a Tier 1 or Tier 2 job on the Green List of in-demand jobs.
- Care workforce and transport sector pathway to residence This pathway to New Zealand residence is for people who work in the care workforce or transport sectors.

## Care workforce and transport sector pathway to residence
This pathway to New Zealand residence is for people who work in the care workforce or transport sectors.
